project_context.domain: Enterprise HRMS SaaS with Reseller Layer
project_context.vibe: Professional, Trustworthy, Data-dense, Crisp, Authoritative. Inspired by Linear, Retool, Rippling.

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-bold

component_guidelines.buttons: High contrast. Primary: Solid black (bg-zinc-950) with white text. Secondary: Outline with border-zinc-200. Radius: rounded-md. Font: IBM Plex Sans medium.
component_guidelines.cards_and_widgets: Flat surfaces. Background: White. Border: 1px solid #E4E4E7 (zinc-200). Shadow: shadow-sm. Padding: p-6. Radius: rounded-lg. No thick shadows.
component_guidelines.data_tables: Dense layout. Header: text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-zinc-500 bg-zinc-50 border-b border-zinc-200. Rows: text-sm border-b border-zinc-100 hover:bg-zinc-50 transition-colors. Sticky headers for large datasets.
component_guidelines.hierarchy_tree: Use subtle vertical/horizontal borders (border-l border-zinc-300) to connect nodes. Nodes should be small compact cards with avatar, name (font-medium text-sm), and role (text-xs text-zinc-500).
component_guidelines.forms: Inputs must have rounded-md, border-zinc-300, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-zinc-950. Heavily customized Shadcn Form components to be sharp and dense.
component_guidelines.marketing_hero: Asymmetric layout. Left: Heavy Chivo typography, massive H1. Right: Architectural abstract or clean dashboard mockup. Subtle grid background pattern.
component_guidelines.navigation: Dashboard: Left fixed sidebar (bg-zinc-50). Marketing: Sticky top nav with Crystal Glassmorphism (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-zinc-200/50).

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Crisp and immediate. Button hovers transition background color slightly. Row hovers on tables should be very subtle off-white.
interactions_and_motion.focus_states: Accessibility first: focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-zinc-950 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-offset-2

icons.style: Regular weight for dashboard dense areas, Duotone for marketing highlights.

hero_marketing.description: Abstract modern black glass building architecture. Use as a subtle right-side visual or hero background.

team_and_culture.description: Diverse corporate team in modern office. Good for 'Reseller' or 'About Us' section.

media_assets.placeholders: DO NOT USE ANY PLACEHOLDER TEXT OR IMAGES. USE THE URLs PROVIDED ABOVE.

testing.data_testid_rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load 'Chivo' and 'IBM Plex Sans' fonts from Google Fonts.
Implement pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layout (use Grid, generous padding).
Use highly customized Shadcn components for Dashboard widgets and data dense areas. Reduce border radii and shadows to match the 'Swiss High-Contrast' aesthetic.
Ensure the dashboard uses a max of 2 main colors (zinc-950 and white) with subtle border contrast. Accent color should only be used for active states.
Build the Multi-level Approval Workflow and Organization Hierarchy Tree with clear structured divs and connecting SVG lines or left borders.
Enforce data-testid on every clickable or critical display element.
Strictly follow the color mappings provided.
